newsSince: No genuinely new news since June 9. The June 5 May-revenue report (2026 high, server/optical shipments ~2.5x YoY, IC-substrate sales +~80% YoY) was already public and explicitly cited in the June 9 verdict. Prior catalysts (NT$100B 2-year capex, ~70% AI revenue, 10 new factories, Thailand ramp) all predate June 9.

sources.label: Zhen Ding strongest May revenue on server/optical surge (Digitimes)
Zhen Ding ~70% AI revenue, NT$100B capex (Digitimes)

verdicts.rankRationale: On the residual-alpha-vs-passives lens, no new fundamental evidence since June 9 (May revenue was already public on June 5). +318% YTD at $21B cap with another news-free pop is rerating chase, not fresh mispricing; crowding penalty deepens slightly, extending the June 9 down call.
verdicts.bull: AI now ~70% of revenue; record server/optical/IC-substrate momentum; aggressive capacity adds.
verdicts.neutral: All catalysts public; the story is fully discovered after +318% YTD.
verdicts.bear: Extreme YTD rerating leaves no hidden/under-owned alpha on a crowding-sensitive list.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: Continued AI-server/optical PCB and IC-substrate ramp.
verdicts.primaryRisk: Positioning/crowding unwind; PCB ASP and capex-digestion risk.
